title: Las mujeres de mi general
writer: Joselito Rodríguez, Celestino Gorostiza, Ismael Rodríguez
actors: Pedro Infante, Lilia Prado, Chula Prieto
plot: Infante stars as a rebel general caught up in a tempestuous romantic tug-of-war between two women: ex-girlfriend (Chula Prieto) and wife (Lilia Prado). This love triangle yields devastating consequences as they must face the gover...
